cron_name.description: `name` of the cron trigger in `spec.triggers[]` to fire.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this agent revision.

request_id.description: Stable client-supplied id so repeated clicks of the same UI 'Fire now' button resolve to the same session id rather than firing twice. The janitor keys dedupe off `cron-manual:<rev>:<name>:<request_id>`. Omit to fire unconditionally — every call generates a fresh UUID.
